research.name: Advancing Agricultural Field Segmentation Using Deep Learning
research.summary: Agricultural field segmentation using deep learning models to identify crop types, weeds, and soil.
research.field: Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Deep Learning
research.supervisor: Dr. M. Sohel Rahman (Professor, CSE, BUET)

research.name: Advancing Automatic Code Review and Code Refinement Generation Using Large Language Models
research.summary: Prompting and PEFT techniques, augmenting static program metadata (function call graph) and natural language summary with human evaluation to improve code review and code refinement generation tasks
research.field: Undergraduate Thesis, Software Engineering, Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing | ArXiv
research.supervisor: Dr. Anindya Iqbal (Professor, CSE, BUET), Dr. Toufique Ahmed (Postdoc, CS, UC Davis)

research.name: Faster and Improved CD-MAWS with Suffix Automata
research.summary: We introduce a refined CD-MAWS method for phylogeny estimation, significantly reducing computational complexity using Suffix Automata
research.field: Bioinformatics, Algorithms, Data Structures | Accepted at WALCOM 2025
research.supervisor: Dr. M. Saifur Rahman (Professor, CSE, BUET)
